### Transmit to the IPPC ePhyto Hub

{{ with .ephyto }}{{ if .error }}⚠️ {{ .error }}

{{ end }}{{ end }}The phytosanitary certificate is ready to be transmitted to the destination country via the global **IPPC ePhyto Hub**. Submitting validates the certificate and delivers it to the Hub.

- **Reference Number**: `{{ .reference_number }}`
- **Certificate Number**: `{{ .certificate_id }}`

Click **Submit to IPPC Hub** to send the certificate.
